note: Timer registry per §13. Populated from known code; will be extended in Phase 8 (state machines) and Phase 15 (reliability).

timers.name: offer_expiry
timers.description: Time window for driver to accept/decline a ride offer before it expires

timers.name: heartbeat_stale_threshold
timers.description: Time since last heartbeat before a driver is marked stale/offline

timers.name: idempotency_key_ttl
timers.description: Time-to-live for idempotency keys before cleanup

timers.name: billing_cron_interval
timers.description: Interval for billing cron to check for billing-due tenants

timers.name: health_snapshot_retention
timers.description: How long health snapshots are retained before cleanup

timers.name: pii_mask_age_days
timers.description: Days after trip completion before PII is masked
